skills.name: tabwright
skills.description: Control the user own Chrome browser via Tabwright extension with Playwright code snippets in a stateful local js sandbox. Use this over other Playwright MCPs to automate the browser because it connects to the user's existing Chrome. Use this for JS-heavy websites, logged-in browser state, saved browser capabilities, and admin/config lookup tasks where saved capability match/routingHint metadata may apply. ALWAYS load this skill before using any tabwright commands, opening admin/config URLs, or answering how to inspect saved Tabwright capabilities.
